titles.title: I've got my mind made up

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: I've got my mind made up, My heart is fixed to follow Jesus all the way. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On this journey, there'll be many ups and downs, But I know the Lord will see you through. There has never been a time when He has let me down, That's why I'll follow Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: I'll follow Jesus, I'll follow Jesus, I'll follow Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've got my mind made up, My heart is fixed to follow Jesus all the way
